monitors.name: Delay Gate
monitors.description: Check binlog sync delay against threshold

monitors.name: Field Drift Monitor
monitors.description: Compare platform metadata with DBA metadata, detect column drift

monitors.name: Special Value Monitor
monitors.description: Check increasing fields, not-null fields, special values

monitors.name: Table Update Monitor
monitors.description: Check max(utime) to detect table switch or migration

monitors.name: Plaintext Guard
monitors.description: Detect sensitive values (phone, ID card, email) in ingested data

monitors.name: Row Count Monitor
monitors.description: Compare row counts between ODS and downstream layers

monitors.name: Null Rate Monitor
monitors.description: Check per-column null ratio against thresholds

monitors.name: Partition Completeness Monitor
monitors.description: Verify all layer partitions exist for each biz_dt
